title: Ender Botany Pots
description: Botany Pots meets Ender Storage. Transfer your Botany Pots harvest directly into your Ender Storage Network.
body:
# Ender Botany Pots

Ender Botany Pots is a simple yet powerful integration mod that combines the convenience of Botany Pots with the storage capabilities of Ender Storage.

Stop lagging your server with thousands of hoppers. With the Ender Botany Pot, your crops are harvested automatically and sent directly to the Ender Storage network.

![Ender Botany Pot next to Ender Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6PDQbwAY/images/74ffc0f79b2f52f9611e34a76671245574719afc.png)

## Features

- Automatic harvesting: Crops harvest themselves and deposit drops directly into a linked Ender Storage network
- Craft an Ender Botany Pot by combining a Hopper Botany Pot with an Ender Chest, Ender Tank or Ender Pouch. Its frequency is kept
- Right click an existing Ender Botany Pot with an Ender Chest, Ender Tank, Ender Pouch or another Ender Botany Pot, to copy its frequency
- Place an Ender Botany Pot with an Ender Chest, Ender Tank, Ender Pouch or Ender Botany Pot in your off-hand to apply a new frequency on placement
- If your Ender Botany Pot is set to private, only you can modify its frequency
- Full support for [The One Probe](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-one-probe) to display frequency and owner information at a glance

## Dependencies

Requires [Botany Pots](https://modrinth.com/mod/botany-pots) and [Ender Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/ender-storage) to work

[Need a server? Just click on the Picture, use the code Wxrlds for 25% off of your first month and play with your friends!](https://bisecthosting.com/Wxrlds?r=EnderBotanyPots+Modrinth)
